creator: mark.evenson@gmx.at
text:
mail/mail-notification-4.0_1 fails to compile against evolution-2.10.  

It looks like evolution-2.10 is not installing consistent header files for plugins to build against:  composer/e-msg-composer.h is needed but not installed under /usr/local/ if /usr/local/include/evolution-2.10/mail/em-event.h is included.

[...]
 cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I.. -DG_DISABLE_ASSERT -DG_DISABLE_CHECKS -DG_DISABLE_CAST_CHECKS -I.. -DG_LOG_DOMAIN=\"mail-notification\" -DORBIT2=1 -D_REENTRANT -DXTHREADS -DXUSE_MTSAFE_API -I/usr/local/include/evolution-2.10 -I/usr/local/include/libgnome-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/libgnomeui-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/libbonoboui-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/evolution-data-server-1.10 -I/usr/local/include/orbit-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/gconf/2 -I/usr/local/include/gnome-vfs-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/gnome-vfs-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/libbonobo-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/bonobo-activation-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/libgnomecanvas-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/gtk-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/libart-2.0 -I/usr/local/include/gnome-keyring-1 -I/usr/local/include/pango-1.0 -I/usr/X11R6/include -I/usr/local/include/freetype2 -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/lib/gtk-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include/atk-1.0 -I/usr/local/include/cairo -I
 /usr/local/include/libxml2 -I/usr/local/include -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -MT liborg_gnome_mail_notification_la-mn-evolution-plugin.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/liborg_gnome_mail_notification_la-mn-evolution-plugin.Tpo -c mn-evolution-plugin.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/liborg_gnome_mail_notification_la-mn-evolution-plugin.o
In file included from mn-evolution-plugin.c:27:
/usr/local/include/evolution-2.10/mail/em-event.h:29:37: composer/e-msg-composer.h: No such file or directory
In file included from mn-evolution-plugin.c:27:
/usr/local/include/evolution-2.10/mail/em-event.h:85: error: syntax error before "EMsgComposer"
/usr/local/include/evolution-2.10/mail/em-event.h:106: error: syntax error before '*' token
gmake[3]: *** [liborg_gnome_mail_notification_la-mn-evolution-plugin.lo] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/mail/mail-notification/work/mail-notification-4.0/src'
gmake[2]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/mail/mail-notification/work/mail-notification-4.0/src'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/mail/mail-notification/work/mail-notification-4.0'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 2
